scripts.build:all: npm run build -w packages/virage-core && npm run build -w packages/virage-agent-core && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.type-check:ci: npm run type-check -w packages/virage-core -w packages/virage-cli -w packages/virage-strategies -w packages/virage-store-postgres -w packages/virage-store-qdrant -w packages/virage-store-chromadb -w packages/virage-embedder-fastembed -w packages/virage-code-chunk-chunker -w packages/virage-agent-core -w packages/virage-agent-copilot -w packages/virage-agent-codex -w packages/virage-agent-antigravity -w packages/virage-agent-claude
scripts.fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format
